name: solhunt
description: Solana wallet health analysis and SOL recovery. Check wallet efficiency, find recoverable SOL from zero-balance token accounts, and build trustless recovery transactions. SolHunt never requires custody of your keys.

pricing.detail: Completely free to use. 15% fee only on successful SOL recovery.

api_key.description: Optional SolHunt API key for higher rate limits. Get yours at https://solhunt.dev/api-keys

tools.name: check_wallet_health
tools.description: Analyze a Solana wallet for recoverable SOL locked in zero-balance token accounts. Returns health score (0-100), exact recoverable SOL amount, number of closeable accounts, and a cleanup recommendation.

tools.name: get_recovery_opportunities
tools.description: Get a prioritized list of specific token accounts to close for maximum SOL recovery. Returns accounts sorted by batch group for efficient transaction building.

tools.name: preview_recovery
tools.description: Preview exactly what a wallet recovery will do before executing. Returns: accounts to close, exact SOL you'll receive, fee amount (15%), net amount, and estimated transaction cost.

max_accounts.description: Max accounts to include (default: all, max: 100)

tools.name: build_recovery_transaction
tools.description: Build unsigned Solana transaction bytes for wallet recovery. Returns base64-encoded unsigned transaction ready for signing.
